creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 228778
"git diff" to update the port

- update 2.49 -> 2.50
Changes: https://metacpan.org/release/DROLSKY/DateTime-TimeZone-2.50/source/Changes

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.0-RELEASE-p4
pkg 1.17.2
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_1
openssl 1.1.1k
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
